title: Surgeon Vacancy at Natco Pharma - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Natco Pharma - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Natco Pharma in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Natco Pharma:
Natco Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Natco Pharma!
